EmptyStates.noLeadsDescription: No leads yet. Add your first lead to start tracking follow-ups and bookings.
EmptyStates.noCampaignsDescription: No campaigns yet. Add campaigns when you want to compare lead quality, booked appointments, and source performance more clearly.
EmptyStates.noFilteredLeadsDescription: No leads match your current filters. Clear filters or adjust the search to broaden results.
EmptyStates.noRecentLeadsDescription: New leads will appear here as soon as they enter the pipeline.
EmptyStates.noReportDescription: Once lead activity is tracked this week, the performance summary will appear here.
EmptyStates.noChartDataDescription: Start capturing leads to unlock trend, source, and pipeline visuals.

Validation.validation.phoneRequired: Enter a phone number with at least 8 digits.
Validation.validation.honeypotInvalid: This submission could not be processed.
Validation.validation.leadNotFound: This lead could not be found.
Validation.validation.saveLeadFailed: We couldn't save the lead right now. Please try again.
Validation.validation.updateLeadFailed: We couldn't update the lead right now. Please try again.
Validation.validation.invalidCampaign: That campaign link is no longer valid for this form.

LeadForm.pageDescription: Capture contact details, lead source, and the next follow-up step so your team knows exactly what to do next.
LeadForm.detailsDescription: Capture enough context for the team to follow up quickly, understand the source, and move the lead toward a booking.
LeadForm.summaryDescription: Save the lead and continue into the detail page for follow-up management.
LeadForm.contactSectionDescription: Make it easy for the team to recognize the person and reach out with confidence.
LeadForm.leadSectionDescription: Capture context that makes reporting and the next follow-up step more useful.
LeadForm.sourceSectionDescription: Keep attribution clean so owners can see what channels and campaigns are actually working.
LeadForm.followUpSectionDescription: Set the next promised action so the queue stays reliable.
LeadForm.notesSectionDescription: Add objections, timing clues, budget signals, or anything useful for a handoff.
LeadForm.fullNameHelp: Use the name your team will recognize immediately.
LeadForm.phoneHelp: Primary number for call-back or SMS follow-up.
LeadForm.emailHelp: Optional, but useful for confirmations and nurturing.
LeadForm.serviceInterestPlaceholder: Teeth whitening, skin treatment, English class...
LeadForm.serviceInterestHelp: What does the customer want to book or learn more about?
LeadForm.preferredContactTimeHelp: Optional timing preference from the customer.
LeadForm.sourceHelp: Choose the source so campaign reporting stays useful.
LeadForm.campaignHelp: Optional when you want to tie the lead to a named promotion or ad set.
LeadForm.statusHelp: Start with the stage that best matches the current conversation.
LeadForm.followUpHelp: Set the next promised action so it appears in the dashboard queue.
LeadForm.notesPlaceholder: Context from chat, preferred appointment time, budget signals...
LeadForm.notesHelp: Add budget clues, preferred timing, objections, or handoff context.
LeadForm.summaryBody: A well-tagged lead helps owners understand which channels are producing real appointment opportunities instead of just message volume.

LeadDetailForm.followUpHelp: Set the next promised contact so it shows up in the follow-up queue.
LeadDetailForm.notesHelp: Keep notes practical: customer intent, timing, objections, and what to do next.
LeadDetailForm.error: We couldn't update the lead right now. Please try again.

LeadTable.workspaceDescription: Search, filter, and open lead records quickly so staff can take action without losing context.
LeadTable.reviewHint: Open any row to review contact details, follow-up timing, and notes.

Dashboard.pageDescription: Track new leads, follow-ups, and booked appointments in one place.
Dashboard.attentionDescription: A short action summary so staff know what to do next without digging through the full lead list.
Dashboard.recentLeadsDescription: The latest leads entering the pipeline, with just enough context to know who needs follow-up next.
Dashboard.leadsByDayDescription: A quick view of daily lead volume so owners can spot momentum changes before the week is over.
Dashboard.leadsBySourceDescription: See which channels are driving the most lead volume into the workspace.
Dashboard.statusDistributionDescription: Understand how much of the pipeline is fresh, active, booked, or at risk of being lost.

attention.followUpNeededText: Any lead waiting too long risks a missed appointment or a cold conversation.
attention.noOverdueText: No overdue follow-up is currently in the queue.
attention.suggestedActionAlert: Call or message the oldest due lead first, then clear the rest of the overdue follow-up queue before new inquiries pile up.
attention.suggestedActionHealthy: The follow-up queue looks healthy. Focus on moving new and interested leads toward booked appointments.

totalLeads.label: Total leads
totalLeads.hint: All inquiries currently tracked in this workspace.

newLeads.label: New leads
newLeads.hint: Fresh opportunities that should be contacted quickly.

followUpNeeded.label: Follow-up needed
followUpNeeded.hint: Leads due today or already overdue for follow-up.

bookedAppointments.label: Booked appointments
bookedAppointments.hint: Leads already converted into confirmed bookings.

conversionRate.label: Conversion rate
conversionRate.hint: Booked appointments as a share of total tracked leads.

Dashboard.emptyAttentionDescription: The follow-up queue looks healthy. Focus on moving new and interested leads toward booked appointments.

Reports.pageDescription: Clear business reporting for lead volume, follow-up risk, and booking performance, even before AI-generated insights are enabled.
Reports.summaryDescription: A quick operating summary for owners who want direction on lead flow, booking performance, and follow-up risk.
Reports.fullReportDescription: Deterministic reporting for demo use today, designed to become AI-generated in a future release.
Reports.futureAi: AI-generated reporting will be available in a future version.
Reports.fallbackBestSource: No clear leader yet. Keep testing the channels that bring qualified inquiries.
Reports.fallbackFollowUpRisk: No follow-up risk detected this week.
Reports.fallbackBookingPerformance: No bookings recorded this week yet.
Reports.bookingPerformanceWithCount: {count} booked appointments were recorded this week.
Reports.fallbackSuggestedAction: Keep an eye on delayed responses and protect follow-up speed.
Reports.fallbackSuggestedActionDetailed: Speed up response time for fresh leads and review any stage where leads are stalling.
Reports.fallbackReadout: Prioritize response speed and the best-performing source while overdue follow-ups are still recoverable.
